_provenance.scope: descriptive — machine-readable mirror of DESIGN.md + extensions (divergence audit, voice, iaPriorities, narrative)
notes: palette is the 7-token Mediterranean-pop set selected from a separate exploration thread (variant-c-teal-saturated of Holler & Hymn)
tokens renamed in brand-native vocabulary: high-lonesome-blue / fiddle-bone / cardinal-flash / sourwood-honey / mountain-laurel / butterfly-pea / barn-ink
palette deployment intensity = `drenched` per intent-dimensions.md § 7.5 (Expressive axis) and per user-documented saturation preference (feedback_palette_saturation_preference.md)

name: High Lonesome
description: Single-maker WNC mountain-spirits house — palette deployed at maximalist intensity

display-hero.expectedCharacter: italic classical serif at huge scale; calligraphic terminals; reads as singing

body.expectedCharacter: humanist serif designed for long-form reading; slightly inktrapped

mono.expectedCharacter: typewriter / Selectric character; tight tracking at body size, loose tracking at marker size

quarantined.rule: Blue Ridge Blue product surface + single-glance light spark on dark grounds; never body text; sub-AA contrast at body sizes
marker / micro-typography / atmospheric glow only; never primary body text; pairs cleanly with high-lonesome-blue and fiddle-bone

typographyMeta.tier: 3-tier hybrid: italic-classical-serif display + humanist serif body + Selectric mono numerals

tierAssignments.display: italic-classical-serif, mixed-case, ≥ 64px; roman display FORBIDDEN; all-caps display FORBIDDEN
tierAssignments.body: humanist serif (Spectral); roman primary + italic for emphasis
tierAssignments.mono: IBM Plex Mono; markers + numerals only; > 14px FORBIDDEN (pushes brand into almanac register)

motion.policy: flat-by-conviction with atmospheric radial-gradients as depth substitute

paletteDeployment.rationale: brand's central tension is auditory-solitude × visual-joy; the palette deploys the joy. Saturation deployment is load-bearing per BRAND.md § Central Tension.

divergence.mode: Mode A — brand-faithful (signal-strong with explicit drenched-deployment + italic-display + atmospheric-cinematic register declared in BRAND.md)

decade.value: mid-century Italian travel posters × Smithsonian Folkways album sleeves (cross-decade fusion)

craft.value: atmospheric cinematic photography (Lane 1) + hand-painted bottle labels (Lane 3) + minimal supporting still-life (Lane 2)

register_flavor.value: Memoir-adjacent (single-voice maker register from BRAND.md voice rules) crossed with Saturated-Poster (Italian-pop palette deployment)
register_flavor.picked_by: brand-native: central tension = auditory solitude × visual joy

ground_family.value: atmospheric-cinematic (radial-gradients + mountain-silhouettes as primary depth language)

palette.source: inherited from BRAND.md (7-token Mediterranean-pop set, brand-native naming)

brand_faithful_inversions.reason: brand-faithful — page surface is mountain-dusk teal, not generic dark
brand-faithful — italic forms read as singing, matches the music-coded central register
user-documented saturation preference + brand-faithful — Drenched deployment is the brand's central thesis

brand_faithful_inversions.retain: mountain-silhouette atmospheric anchor over abstract heroes
brand_faithful_inversions.reason: brand-faithful — the Blue Ridge is the brand's place, the silhouette IS the brand
brand-faithful — all-caps display would collapse the brand into Holler & Hymn's revival-tent register
brand-faithful — Italian-language words in copy would collapse the brand into trattoria costume

checked: Hero text on photographic background without contrast scrim
Generic role names in palette (forbidden, brand-native used)
3-col card grid for products (forbidden, full-bleed bottle-poster sections used)
Foxfire-Book reissue (sage/oxblood/cream-only) — saturated palette refuses this
Wes Anderson costume-pastel (caught by atmospheric grounds + cinematic landscape register)
antiToolboxAudit.result: clean — all checked, none required removal

credits-bar-header.purpose: minimal serif top strip; mark + nav + edition marker
credits-bar-header.ground: transparent over hero atmospheric, becomes high-lonesome-blue on scroll

atmospheric-section.purpose: primary composition unit — full-bleed ground + atmospheric radial-gradient + italic-display headline + humanist serif body + single CTA or link-out

landscape-vista.purpose: aspect-ratio placeholder slot for Blue Ridge photography (Gemini Lane 1)

bottle-poster.purpose: per-product full-bleed cinematic section; image left/right alternating

liner-notes-list.purpose: centered type block for pour list (album-credits register)

age-gate-modal.purpose: 21+ verification before content; focusable, non-dismissable, irreversible no-exit

voice.register: slow plainspoken declaratives; specifics over modifiers; reverent not irreverent; joyful not playful
do: Specifics over modifiers — 'ten miles past anywhere', '1983 in Verona', 'elev. 4,140 ft', 'twenty-seven herbs'.
Reverent, not irreverent. Joyful, not playful.
Italian DNA in the palette, never in the language.
dont: we / our team / passionate / crafted / curated / artisanal / award-winning / finest
adjective stacks of three or more
Italian-language words (atelier / piazza / trattoria / dolce / Roma)

do: One voice in a wide place.
I sing while I work. I think it goes in.
The labels are loud because I like them loud.
1983, Verona. I came back with a permanent sense of color.
dont: Our passionate team of artisans crafts each bottle with care.
Atelier Sadie — a journal of mountain joy.
Bottled with love in the WNC mountains.

rules: Voice is quiet against the loud palette. Saturation × restraint is the brand's tension.
Italian DNA is implicit (palette) never explicit (copy).
Reverent — the brand smiles, does not wink.
First-person singular everywhere except legal/utility footer.

iaPriorities.evidence: home page leads with a single CTA 'Visit the Shop' (external link to .shop subdomain). Secondary text-link 'read about the maker' is subordinate.

narrative.northStar: Mountain song, Italian-pop wrap. The recordings of Bill Monroe pressed onto vinyl jackets designed by Massimo Vignelli.
narrative.overview: High Lonesome is a single-maker WNC mountain-spirits house. The visual system deploys a saturated 7-token Mediterranean-pop palette across cinematic-landscape-led sections, italic-classical-serif display throughout, and humanist serif body. The central tension is auditory solitude × visual joy — quiet voice, loud palette.
keyCharacteristics: 7 brand tokens deployed across ≥ 4 distinct section grounds on the home page (Drenched palette deployment)
Asymmetric cycling between section grounds — no strict A/B alternation
Italic-classical-serif display (Playfair Display italic) at all sizes ≥ 64px
Humanist serif body (Spectral) with italic emphasis
IBM Plex Mono for markers + numerals only (≤ 14px)
Atmospheric radial-gradient grounds + mountain-silhouette horizons (cinematic landscape register)
Flat — no shadows, no glassmorphism, no glass / depth language
rules: The Saturation-Deployment Rule — ≥ 4 distinct section grounds; asymmetric cycling required.
The Italian-DNA-Implicit Rule — palette only, never copy.
The Italic-Display Rule — italic only at ≥ 64px; roman forbidden.
The Mixed-Case Display Rule — all-caps forbidden at display tier.
The Mono-As-Marker Rule — IBM Plex Mono ≤ 14px only.
The Quiet-Voice Rule — slow declaratives against loud palette.
The No-Pure-Black Rule — barn-ink #2d1a14 is darkest.
IA-priority — single primary CTA ('Visit the Shop') above the fold.
dos: Keep voice quiet against the loud palette.
Preserve atmospheric cinematic register on placeholder sections.
